nodes.description: Neo was forced into a false reality by The Analyst, and believes himself to be the game designer named Thomas Anderson, who designed a series of Matrix video games that are based on Neo's own memories. Renowned actor Keanu Reeves has reprised his role of Neo for the fourth installment of the franchise, The Matrix Resurrections, and we are very excited to unveil this legendary character as the Neo Sixth Scale Collectible Figure as the Toy Fair Exclusive item available only in selected markets.  Faithfully crafted based on the appearance of Keanu Reeves as Neo in The Matrix Resurrections, the Neo figure features a newly developed head sculpt and hair sculpture highlighting impressive likeness; the iconic long coat and form-fitting outfit with fine tailoring; an array of highly-detailed accessories including a pair of sunglasses, a bottle of pills, bullets with interchangeable waves effect, two-sided backdrop with mirror and frame, a Matrix video game themed backdrop with lenticular effect, interchangeable hands with blue pills and red pills, and a Matrix figure stand. nodes.description: Just one day. That's all I'm asking for. Just one day without someone yelling, 'Help! Help!'   Sideshow presents the Miles Morales Premium Format™ Figure, a dynamic new Marvel collectible statue swinging straight to your shelf.  The Miles Morales Premium Format Figure measures 23.5 tall and 15.88 wide as the young hero swings over the New York City skyline. The unique forced perspective base gives a spider's eye view of Miles' neighborhood, complete with a subway train making its way to the next stop on the line. Luckily for Spider-Man, navigating city streets is a lot easier with the right threads.  Based on the hero's iconic appearance in Marvel Comics, the polystone Miles Morales Premium Format Figure features a mixed media costume application — his non-removable fabric jacket adds dimension and style to a sculpted black and red spider-suit. Thematic paint application reflects the blue glow of the city lights onto Miles' legs and sneakers as he slings webs all the way home. Detailed textures and raised red webbing on his suit give added depth to the striking design, making Miles Morales practically pop off the page into three-dimensional Spider-Man collectible form. Pair Miles with the Ghost-Spider Premium Format™ Figure for even more radioactive action in your collection.  The Exclusive Edition of the Miles Morales Premium Format Figure includes an alternate unmasked portrait revealing Spider-Man's secret identity to the city. Say, What's up? to danger across the Spider-Verse with this exclusive display option.  Untangle the web of the Spider-Verse and bring home the Miles Morales Premium Format Figure for your Marvel collection today!
nodes.name: Miles Morales

nodes.description: Sideshow and Paragon FX Group present the 1966 Batman TV Series Bat-Radio.  Batman (The Television Series) premiered January 12, 1966 and ran for three seasons. The series follows the adventures of millionaire Bruce Wayne and his ward Dick Grayson. A crime fighting duo who as, 'Batman and Robin' defend Gotham City from a colorful network of arch villains. The 120th episode aired on March 14, 1968.  Throughout the series, Batman and Robin utilize a myriad of high-tech devices in their pursuit of Gotham's most villainous. Among the seemingly endless amount of gear stored within their utility belts is the Bat-Radio. Capable of clean transmission throughout Gotham, this bat shaped 2-way transceiver (walkie-talkie) insured the Dynamic-Duo were in constant communication when otherwise separated.  The original props (primarily manufactured in wood) were hand cut and adorned with collapsible brass antenna. A simple light, denoting transmission was the only other feature present on the hero models.  Paragon FX Group in association in Warner Bros. proudly presents this official replica of the Bat-Radio. Prior to production, Paragon's staff spent months studying the history of the original props to ensure that the replica you have before you becomes a cherished part of your personal collection.
nodes.name: 1966 Batman TV Series Bat-Radio

nodes.description: Don't you see how strong I am? Don't you know what I'm capable of?   Sideshow Art Prints and Alex Ross Art present the Iron Man: Fire and Fury Fine Art Lithograph, a scorching Marvel Comics art print featuring the armored Avenger.  Tony Stark has faced demons both within himself and beyond his armor. Acclaimed artist Alex Ross once again turns to Iron Man and his incredible armor in this detailed illustration depicting the red and gold-plated super hero high above the New York City skyline. Facing his latest challenge against the cosmic Korvac, the heat is on as Tony Stark channels his own strength through every ounce of fuel, fire, and fury his suit can muster.  Originally created as the cover to Iron Man #3 (2020), written by Christopher Cantwell for Marvel Comics, this photorealistic comic book artwork is now available to fans in a high-end format. Each Iron Man: Fire and Fury Fine Art Lithograph comes hand-signed by Alex Ross and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this dynamic Marvel wall art makes a fantastic addition to any fan's Hall of Armor.   Ignite your repulsors and propel your collection to new heights with the Iron Man: Fire and Fury Fine Art Lithograph by Alex Ross.
nodes.name: Iron Man: Fire and Fury

nodes.description: It begins here, an army — to bring sense to a world plagued by worse than thieves and murderers.   Sideshow Art Prints presents The Dark Knight Returns Fine Art Print, a dramatic DC Comics art print by artist Dave Wilkins after Frank Miller.  Drawing inspiration from the iconic cover of Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, artist Dave Wilkins captures Bruce Wayne's descent on a lawless Gotham. In the absence of its Caped Crusader, the city has fallen to ruin beneath villains and gangs running unchecked. This moody composition features familiar faces of both friends and foes as Batman returns to the unending fight, illuminated by a single bolt of lightning. Two-Face, Robin (Carrie Kelley), Commissioner Gordon, Green Arrow, the Mutant Leader, The Joker, and Superman can be seen as symbols of the reasons both good and bad that inspire the Dark Knight to stand against crime once again.  Each The Dark Knight Returns Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this Batman wall art is a must-have for fans looking to pay tribute to a celebrated DC Comics story.  Let's ride — bring justice back to Gotham and add The Dark Knight Returns Fine Art Print by Dave Wilkins to your collection today.
nodes.name: The Dark Knight Returns

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints and the Frank Frazetta Art Museum present the Escape From Venus Fine Art Print.  Frank Frazetta's unparalleled creative vision has defined popular fantasy, science fiction, and horror artwork for multiple generations. This heart-stopping scene was originally used as the cover of the 1974 reissue of Escape on Venus, a science fiction fantasy novel by Edgar Rice Burroughs. In the vibrant wilderness of an alien world, a woman arms herself in the fight for survival. An extraterrestrial tiger bares its fangs at the knife-wielding warrior, representing just one obstacle in the race to flee from the untamed planet.  Each Escape From Venus Fine Art Print in the limited edition of 300 pieces includes a Certificate of Authenticity and features a hand-stamped, authorized signature of artist Frank Frazetta as well as the official Frazetta Art Museum embossed Seal of Authenticity. A portion of the proceeds from sales of Escape From Venus will directly benefit the Frazetta Art Museum's preservation and exhibition of the artist's essential works. Available unframed and in a custom framed format with a matching double mat design, this sci-fi fantasy artwork is a must-have for Frazetta collectors.  Brave the outer wilds and bring home the Escape From Venus Fine Art Print by Frank Frazetta today.
nodes.name: Escape From Venus

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints and the Frank Frazetta Art Museum present the Death Dealer III (Original) Fine Art Print by legendary fantasy artist Frank Frazetta. This essential fantasy artwork is one in a series of iconic designs the artist created of this signature character.  As an artist, Frank Frazetta was constantly challenging himself and reinventing his own imagery, especially when it came to the famed figure of the Death Dealer. The Death Dealer III (Original) illustration is one in a series of iconic designs the artist created, first introduced in 1987 and later used as the cover of James Silke's Lords of Destruction: Death Dealer Book 2. This depiction of Frazetta's ominous original character stands tall on the remains of a battlefield while smoke and ash billow around the hellscape. Armed with an axe and a sword, this menacing warrior stares with piercing red eyes at any who dare to challenge him.  Faithfully recreating all the fearsome details of this famous image, each Death Dealer III (Original) Fine Art Print features a hand-stamped, authorized signature of artist Frank Frazetta as well as the official Frazetta Art Museum embossed Seal of Authenticity. Each piece in the limited edition of 300 will also include a Certificate of Authenticity, and a portion of the proceeds will directly benefit the Frazetta Art Museum's preservation and exhibition of the artist's famed original works. Available unframed and in a custom framed format, this terrifying fantasy wall art makes an exciting addition to any collector's gallery.  Deliver a fatal blow and bring home the Death Dealer III (Original) Fine Art Print by Frank Frazetta today.
nodes.name: Death Dealer III (Original)

This vibrant scene by Derrick Chew captures the explosive energy of the signature X-Men maneuver as a Sentinel comes crashing down behind them.  Each Wolverine & Colossus: Fastball Special! Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this archival quality giclée X-Men wall art will make a long-lasting addition to any X-Men collection.  Coming in hot! Catch the Wolverine & Colossus: Fastball Special! Fine Art Print by Derrick Chew for your display today.

nodes.description: Sideshow and the Good Smile Company presnt the Yor Forger Nendoroid Collectible Figure.  Yor Forger from the anime Spy x Family joins the Nendoroid series! Also known as Codename: Thorn Princess, the skilled assassin trained in the art of killing from a young age.  The anime figure comes with three face plates including a standard face, a smiling face with closed eyes, and a more soft and gentle smiling face.  Enjoy using the included optional parts like her weapons to create all kinds of poses based on your favorite scenes from the series!  Be sure to add this palm-sized Yor Forger figure to your Spy x Family figure collection!

nodes.description: 'Now you know your limits!'  POP-UP PARADE is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! Each figure typically stands around 17-18cm in height and the series features a vast selection of characters from popular anime and game series, with many more to be added soon.  From 'Fire Emblem: Three Houses' comes a new series of POP-UP PARADE figures. The first figures in the series are from the Black Eagles. Black Eagles house leader Edelgard has been captured in figure form in a standing pose with her beautiful hair fluttering behind her.  Be sure to add this Edelgard von Hresvelg figure to your Fire Emblem collection today!
nodes.name: Pop Up Parade Edelgard von Hresvelg

nodes.description: Sideshow and X-plus present the Hedorah (Flying Form) Collectible Figure.  The latest entry in the FAVORITE SCULTORS LINE series which features soft vinyl versions of garage kits created by famous sculptors.  Now features Hedorah in their flying form from Godzilla vs. Hedorah (released in 1971) from the Resin Chef and Ukeke-dan sculpting association!  Hedorah is a monster created by Hedrium, a galactic lifeform that is said to have come space while attached to ameteorite and absorbed various substances such as sludge in order to bring Hedorah into existence.  Upon repeatedly merging and splitting, Hedorah finally reaches a form which is capable of flight. This form possesses so much power that it can carry Godzilla through the air with ease. Enjoy it's powerful size when it is in it's flying form which has been recreated to be approximately 38cm in length!  Hedorah is one of the most powerful enemies of the Godzilla series, and we hope you will add it to your collection!
nodes.name: Hedorah (Flying Form)

nodes.description: 'Anywhere I can hide?'   POP UP PARADE is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! nodes.description: From the F:Nex line comes a new figure from the critically acclaimed Ghost in the Shell franchise: Motoko Kusanagi!  Depicted on a 1:7 scale, this statue showcases the Major about to enter the network through a neural link. Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Motoko Kusanagi

nodes.description: Pop Up Parade XL hits the scene in a big way! From the anime series 'Fairy Tail Final Season' comes a Pop Up Parade XL anime figure of the Dragon Slayer who always looks out for his friends, Natsu Dragneel!  Pop Up Parade figures are now available in stunning 40cm XL size! Featuring stunning sculpting and paintwork that can only be enjoyed at this size! Pop Up Parade is bringing figure fans a brand new sense of excitement with the XL line. Be sure to add this gigantic and cool Natsu figure to your Fairy Tail figure collection!
nodes.name: Pop Up Parade Natsu Dragneel XL

nodes.description: Hatsune Miku's rose-like beauty just for you.  From the smartphone game 'HATSUNE MIKU: COLORFUL STAGE!' comes a scale figure of Hatsune Miku wearing her 'Rose Cage' outfit as designed by illustrator En Morikura! The charm of En Morikura's original illustration has been captured in incredible detail. From her elaborately sculpted twintail hairstyle to the delicate lace accents and sparkling skirt of her outfit, the figure is packed with gorgeous detail from top to bottom.  Be sure to add this Hatsune Miku figure to your anime figure collection!
nodes.name: Hatsune Miku: Rose Cage

nodes.description: Haruhiko Mikimoto's rendition of Hatsune Miku is finally in figure form!  From 'Character Vocal Series 01: Miku Hatsune' comes a scale figure based on the album art of popular Vocaloid producer Mitchie M's long-awaited second full album 'Virtual Pop Star'.  Based on Haruhiko Mikimoto's illustration, the figure was sculpted by Chieri, a longtime fan of Mikimoto's work. The figure's overwhelmingly detailed sculpting is complemented by ultra-precise paintwork. Additionally, the base of the figure can be displayed lit up. This rainbow glow effect makes it possible to capture the fantastic atmosphere of the original album art in figure form.  Be sure to add her to your collection today!
nodes.name: Hatsune Miku: Virtual Pop Star Version

nodes.description: Sideshow and Alter present the Rei Ayanami (Millennials Illust Version) Collectible Figure.  From the anime Neon Gensis Evangelion comes a figure of Rei Ayanami wearing a hoodie over a plugsuit.  Mai Yoneyama's illustration for the cover of EVANGELION Millennials2 is used for the figure's motif.  Notice how the fleeting and innocent nuance of the illustration is skillfully recreated with the sculpting. It is superb how the quiet standing pose expresses such overwhelming sensitivity.  Even the contrast in coloring, form and textures of the plugsuit and light gray hoodie are expertly crafted.  To top it off, clear materials with a light paint gradation is used for the hair to help recreate the character's translucent impression.
nodes.name: Rei Ayanami (Millennials Illust Version)

nodes.description: The thrilling Faces of Gotham™ Silver Coin Collection is back again with its seventh release, featuring the Clown Princess of Crime, HARLEY QUINN™.   This 1oz pure silver coin is colored and shaped to highlight the flamboyant anti-heroine. Some light relief has been added to the design to create further impact. To confirm the coin as legal tender, the Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is finely engraved on the obverse.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a custom-designed box, including a large window for display. If you'd like to take a closer look, you can do so without worry as the coin is safely secured in an acrylic capsule. A Certificate of Authenticity and the coin's unique serial number in the mintage of 5,000 coins are printed on the box.   This is one quintessential collectible! Order today before you miss out.
nodes.name: Harley Quinn 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Purge troopers are a specialized class of Imperial soldier trained and equipped to assist the Inquisitors™ in hunting down Jedi™ and other Force-sensitive beings who threaten the Empire. Borrowing tactics and methods first used by the Republic soldiers that accompanied Jedi generals during the Clone Wars, this elite group is few in number and keeps out of the public eye.   Following the finale of the Obi-Wan Kenobi live-action series, Sideshow and Hot Toys are pleased to present the Purge Trooper Sixth Scale Collectible Figure.  The collectible figure is meticulously crafted with a detailed helmet and armor in black and red paint applications, a form-fitting under-suit, a red pauldron, a blaster rifle, and a figure base!   This new specialized Stormtrooper figure will be an excellent addition to your Star Wars collectibles display!
nodes.name: Purge Trooper

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are proud to present the Optimus Prime Bishoujo Statue!  The Transformers series was originally a line of toys that stood out for having familiar objects that could transform into robotic lifeforms, and became widely known through the anime and movies!  In a collaboration between Hasbro, Takara Tomy, and Kotobukiya, this series which has been loved by fans around the world since 1984 will be released as a new line as TRANSFORMERS BISHOUJO!  The statue was made into the Bishoujo style by Shunya Yamashita based on the first ever, core series that is still beloved to this very day, The Transformers!  First in the series comes one who loves peace, Autobot leader, Optimus Prime. Starting with Optimus Prime's head parts, which have been rearranged into loose buns on the statue to the trailer reimagined into a briefcase, the original design has been carefully incorporated into this new appearance.  Be sure to check out the details on the boots and belt as well. See the leadership shining through with this famous pose, 'I've got an idea.'  Change out the head part to the battle mask version for an even more gallant look! The base is designed with the Autobot logo in metallic paint. Megatron and Bumblebee are currently in development as the second and third additions to the series! Roll out!
nodes.name: Optimus Prime Bishoujo

nodes.description: NAUTS and DAMTOYS are proud to team up to deliver the Claire Redfield (Classic Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the popular CAPCOM game RESIDENT EVIL 2!  This classic edition of the Claire Redfield figure features a highly detailed and posable body with over 30 points of articulation, allowing fans to recreate their favorite moments from the cult-classic survival horror game. A fully fabricated costume lets you model Claire as seen in the original 1998 version as well as the 2019 remake, and an unbelievable array of weapons and accessories make this one video game figure you don't want to miss out on!  Resident Evil collectibles fans, try to escape Raccoon city with the help of Claire Redfield, and add to your horror collection today!
nodes.name: Claire Redfield (Classic Version)

nodes.description: NAUTS and DAMTOYS are proud to team up to deliver the Leon S. Kennedy (Classic Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the popular CAPCOM game RESIDENT EVIL 2!  This Classic edition of Leon features a highly detailed and posable body with over 30 points of articulation, allowing fans to recreate their favorite moments from the cult-classic survival horror game. A fully fabricated RPD uniform and an unbelievable array of weapons and accessories make this one video game figure you don't want to miss out on! nodes.name: Leon S. Kennedy (Classic Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Threezero present the ROBO-DOU Tekkaman Blade Collectible Figure based on the anime series Tekkaman Blade, produced by Tatsunoko Productions that aired in 1992. The figure is fully-articulated, replicating its original design from the anime while accentuating its mechanical details.  ROBO-DOU Tekkaman Blade is approximately 20cm (7.8 ) tall, and utilizes a die-cast interior frame that provides 74 points of articulation. It is constructed of ABS, PVC, POM and zinc alloy, providing a tactile durability as well as foundation for maintaining balance. LED light-up features are installed in the eyes, forehead, and the Voltekka shooting ports at both shoulders.  For the weapons, the figure includes a double-ended lance 'Tekk Lancer,' a 'Tekk Shield, and a whip-like 'Tekk Wire.' The Tekk Lancer can be separated into two blades. The Tekk Shield can be mounted on either the hip or on the left forearm. The Tekk Wire has metal wire inside, which makes it bendable and poseable, and can also be attached to the Tekk Shield. The fins at both sides of the ribs are interchangeable between closed and opened forms. Additional accessories include one Crystal which is used in the anime for transforming into Tekkaman, two interchangeable hip covers (one piece with a ball joint for attaching shield, one piece without a ball joint), three pieces of interchangeable left forearm covers (one piece with a ball joint on the side for attaching shield, one piece with a ball joint on the back for attaching shield, and one piece without a ball joint), and five sets of interchangeable hands (one pair of fists, one pair of weapon-holding hands, one pair of action pose hands, one pair of spear hands, and one left hand for holding the Crystal).
nodes.name: ROBO-DOU Tekkaman Blade

nodes.description: Gore Magala, a terrifying monster first introduced in Monster Hunter 4, makes its way to the Capcom Figure Builder - Creator's Kit line!  Gore Magala stands poised, ready and eager for battle amid a rocky landscape, its unique physiology on full display, six limbs and wings tensed, and jaw parted in a defiant roar that shows off its dangerous teeth.  This PVC figure, officially manufactured and released by Capcom, stands just over 8 inches tall, making it an imposing display that can fit almost anywhere- a perfect mix of form and function.  Add this bizarre wyvern to your Monser Hunter collection today!
nodes.name: Gore Magala Creator's Model

nodes.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are proud to present the Satoru Gojo (Kyoshiki Murasaki Version) Collectible Figure! Beautiful bolts are unleashed as initiated by a hand sign, resulting in an extraordinary, yet destructive, energy wave. nodes.description: Sideshow and the Good Smile Company present the Harmonia Bloom Belle Collectible Doll.  The courageous Disney Princess, Belle, waltzes into Good Smile Company's Harmonia Bloom doll line. Belle's looks have been faithfully recaptured in her silky hair wig and beloved golden ball gown. A special commemorative base retells the story of Disney's Beauty and the Beast through silhouettes of its characters.  Be sure to add this Belle doll to your Disney collectibles display!
nodes.name: Harmonia Bloom Belle

nodes.description: The Holy Grail of Comic Books on New Silver Coin!  Amazing news! Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are proud to present the first COMIX™ Coin, based on the most popular and sought-after comic books! This first release features Action Comics #1, aka the Mona Lisa of comics.   The face of the coin shows a colored image of the first issue of Action Comics from June 1938, featuring the first appearance of SUPERMAN™. To mimic the comic book, it is crafted into a rectangular coin and includes further colorization on the four sides to represent the spine and pages. Small flashes of silver have been left on the cover to catch the light!. It may seem too good to be true, but this is still a legal tender coin, with the Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Queen Elizabeth II engraved on the obverse.  Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, each coin is nestled in black velvet and placed in a secure, custom-designed box. The packaging incorporates a large window so you can show off this brilliant collectible. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the box, alongside the coin's unique serial number in the limited mintage of just 5,000 coins.   Don't miss your chance to grab this one-of-a-kind replica today!
nodes.name: Action Comics #1 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Factory Entertainment present the legendary Diamond Ray of Disappearance Prop Replica.  It holds the power to banish any living thing that gazes upon it to a timeless dimension. Secured in its magical box, the power of the artifact is unleashed when the box is opened and the gem is revealed. It was thought lost for eons until it was recovered and wielded by Skeletor in the first episode of the 1983 animated TV series, He-Man and the Masters of the Universe. It was the first of many such magical artifacts employed by Skeletor in his attempts to obtain the power of Grayskull. It was eventually destroyed by He-Man who crushed the stone with his bare hands... Or was it?  Factory Entertainment's design team, working with Mattel, wanted to create a real-world interpretation of this important 'McGuffin' that would bridge the realms of fantasy and reality. The Factory Entertainment team spent many hours studying the vintage animation, and drew inspiration from both the 1983 and 2002 series, as well as the cover art of the 2001 commemorative VHS release. This replica has been designed to capture all the iterations as a singular blended execution.  The box was first sculpted as a 3D model. Taking inspiration from ancient ossuary boxes, fine details where then added by hand to give the appearance of age and wear. It features mystical engraved script and is cast from polystone.   The stone itself is supported on an industrial-looking cradle that houses an LED lighting effect. This effect is triggered by a hidden sensor when the box is opened, lighting the diamond from beneath.  A round-cut diamond shape was chosen to maximize the sparkle when the LED light shines through its many facets. The stone is high pressure cast in acrylic.  Every replica is supplied in a full color collector box and comes with a certificate of authenticity.
nodes.name: Diamond Ray of Disappearance

nodes.description: Nome momentarily gives a sense of ease on the vessel Maw, where horrible events occur one after another, joins the palm-sized figure series.  The scene where Nome holds out a sausage, followed by the shocking incident, is faithfully recreated. The adorable infant body shape and conical head creates a mysterious atmosphere. The spotlight and shadow visuals that make you anticipate something dramatic is on the verge of happening in the game, are recreated here with remarkable paint work.   'Little Nightmares' is a horror adventure game starring Six a little girl who's trying to escape the massive vessel Maw, using her courage and wisdom. The heroine Six, and the strange and horrible residents by her side are recreated as palm-sized mini figures. Symbolic props for each character adorn the detailed diorama bases, capturing the wonderful and weird atmosphere of the game.
nodes.name: Nome

nodes.description: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) from the Action RPG NieR:Automata has become a figure with the prototype sculpted by Mitsumasa Yoshizawa (REFLECT).   The Deluxe Version comes with replaceable parts such as short hair head type, body without heat-radiating camisole, and Cruel Arrogance (spear), in addition to the main A2 figure which includes the long hair head type, body with a heat-radiating camisole, and Type-4O Sword, offering a variety of display options.  *Only (1) A2 Main Body included.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your NieR:Automata collection today!
nodes.name: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) Deluxe Version

nodes.description: Sideshow and Storm Collectibles present, making his way to victory is the newest Mortal Kombat action figure series – Liu Kang.  Mortal Kombat 3 debuted Animalities as a finisher and many veteran players might remember Liu Kang's animality, the dragon who eats the upper half of the opponent.  Well, Storm Collectibles has gone all-out to include his animality Dragon form, which stands approx. 12 tall, and is fully articulated!  Liu Kang has multiple articulation points that allow him to recreate his iconic moves, as well as multiple accessories such as his fire ball effect, and more!  Orphaned at a very young age. Liu Kang was raised by Shaolin monks, who taught him the way of the spiritual warrior. They soon recognized his potential as a contender for the Mortal Kombat tournament and rigorously trained him for this task. Raiden, too, understood that Liu Kang was Earthrealm's best hope for freedom and introduced him to Master Bo' Rai Cho to further his development.  Once fully trained, Liu Kang bested all challengers and earned the high honor of representing the Shaolin in the Mortal Kombat tournament. He and Raiden then embarked on their fateful journey to Shang Tsung's island to compete in this pivotal kontest.
nodes.name: Liu Kang

nodes.description: 'Whosoever holds this hammer, if he be worthy, shall possess the power of Thor.'  From the Avengers comes the god of thunder, Thor to kick off a new chapter of MARVEL ARTFX statues.   With new content constantly being pumped out now, this collection deliberately returns to styling from the 90s and 2000s, two periods that saw a boom in collector culture.   The retro-classic style is delicately sculpted using modern 3D sculpting technology.   The painted shadows feature bold color choices seen never before that add a contemporary art-inspired look, perfect for the start of a new collection.
nodes.name: Thor (The Bronze Age)

nodes.description: There's something out there waiting for us, and it ain't no man. We're all gonna die. – Billy  Prime 1 Studio is excited to present an amazing supplement to a previous fan-favorite statue, and an incredible product on its own: the 1:3 scale PBPR-02: Jungle Hunter Predator Bust, Unmasked Version from Predator (1987)!  Poised to be attractive to ardent Predator fans who did not or were not able to buy the full-sized MMPR-01 Jungle Hunter Predator Statue, the Jungle Hunter Predator Bust is the perfect purchase!  Prime 1 Studio artisans have crafted this bust with the same precision and attention to detail that they devoted to the full statue.  We have outfitted the Jungle Hunter Predator Bust, Unmasked Version with his grotesque unmasked look. Towards the end of the 1987 film, as the Jungle Hunter Predator hunted Dutch Schaefer into a corner, he took his Bio-Mask off to reveal his true form! Which prompted Dutch to say one of the movies MOST iconic lines: You are one UGLY m$%&therf&# !&ker! Furthermore, we have equipped this bust with an LED Illuminated Plasma Cannon, so that you can proudly display this beast as it is ready to lay waste to everyone around it.  Any discerning connoisseur of the Predator franchise will immediately recognize these busts as an instant legendary classic. So don't wait on getting the Jungle Hunter Predator Bust, Unmasked Version... his self-destruct sequence is counting down! 3...2...1...
nodes.name: Jungle Hunter Predator (Unmasked Version)

nodes.description: Scott Pilgrim and Ramona Flowers jump out of the pages of Bryan Lee O'Malley's graphic novel and onto your shelf with new 6 collectible figures from ISH! nodes.description: Digimon is joining the Dynaction series, and their first character is none other than the Royal Knight Omegamon! Omegamon includes tons of accessories for extended play such as mini figures of Taichi and Yamato that can ride on his shoulder.  Don't miss your chance to add this collectible figure to your Digimon collection today!

nodes.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the White Snake - Xiaoqing-Verta Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. nodes.description: Pixar and Disney are ready to take Toy Story fans to new realistic heights with the release of Lightyear!  Beast Kingdom's highly articulable DAH (Dynamic 8ction Heroes) figure is ready to take you 'To Infinity and Beyond' with the release of the Zurg DAH-077 figure. Following the more realistic take on Zurg, the DAH features 16 points of articulation and a highly detailed body design, which stands at an intimidating 24cm in height. The detailed color scheme of the robotic armor is matched with LED light-up functions in the scary-looking eyes and mouth. Of course, the legendary arm laser canon function is also on full display.  Disney fans, you won't want to miss adding this supervillain to your collection today!
nodes.name: Zurg

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace present the next superb 1:4 scale statue in the My Favourite Legend series, the brilliant actor James Dean in his iconic red jacket.  James Dean was an actor ahead of his time and his tragic death at age 24 cemented his reputation as a true Hollywood legend. He only made a handful of films, but in every one he stood out as one of the best performers of his generation.  Star Ace brings James Dean to life in this 1:4 scale polyresin statue which includes a diorama base placing the teenaged rebel standing on a street corner, smoking a cigarette.  This statue features a detailed and accurate likeness of the actor and depicts him in the memorable outfit of red jacket, white t-shirt, jeans, and black boots.  *The deluxe version of this statue includes an addition to the diorama base - a light-up streetlamp modeled from the lamps seen in Los Angeles during the 1950s.
nodes.name: James Dean (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: A former Sith Lord™ and a skilled warrior in his own right, Darth Maul™ wanted nothing but to defeat Obi-wan Kenobi™ and see the Jedi Empire™ fall.   Made from 1oz pure silver, this thrilling coin has been shaped and colored to represent Maul™ as Chibi art. It showcases him with his notable Dathomirian™ like features and donning a black undertunic. To confirm it is legal tender, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   The coin is officially licensed and arrives in a custom-designed box that includes striking images of Maul and a large window for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back of the box, along with coin's unique number in the mintage of 2,000.   Attack now to own one of these thrilling limited-edition pieces!
nodes.name: Darth Maul 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: The second fighter in the Mortal Kombat Chibi® series features the powerful assassin of the Lin Kuei clan, Sub-Zero.   Officially licensed, this 'cool' coin has been shaped and colored to resemble the early version of Sub-Zero as Chibi art. He appears in his iconic blue tunic and mask, with contrasting black headgear. The Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   The 1oz pure silver coin arrives in a Mortal Kombat-themed box, which includes a large window for display. Printed at the back, you will find the Certificate of Authenticity and the coin's unique serial number in the limited mintage of 2,000 coins.   Defend Earthrealm with this mighty piece today!
nodes.name: Sub-Zero 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace Toys are proud to present the Centaur (Deluxe Version) Statue!  Ray Harryhausen created the one-eyed centaur to be a menacing monster, his giant club at the ready to take on heroes and other dangerous creatures.   Star Ace has recreated the Harryhausen puppet as a 33cm tall soft vinyl statue, posed in mid-battle. Sculpted by the renowned artisans at Kaibutsuya, each piece is meticulously hand-painted.  The Deluxe version comes with a polyresin diorama base depicting the floor of the Centaur's cave.  Don't miss your chance to add this soft vinyl statue to your monster collection today!
nodes.name: Centaur (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Infinite Statue are celebrating a great, unforgettable personality from the world of cinema: Jerry Lewis (The Professor Edition – Deluxe)  A true American comedy legend, appreciated the world over, Jerry Lewis is considered as the heir to Buster Keaton and Charlie Chaplin for his innovative humour, unique gesture and facial expression, to the point that he was known as The King of Comedy . Jerry Lewis conquered his spectators right from his earliest sketches based on impressions. With his stage performances, and his work in cinema and TV, he became a Hollywood star who, initially as a duo with Dean Martin and later as a solo artist, gave us comic masterpieces based on original, hilarious and timeless gags.  Reconstructing the iconography of a subject such as Professor Julius Kelp required total attention to the details. The meticulous care dedicated to the clothing and details make this tribute statuette an unmissable cult object. For the first time ever, the King of Comedy has a place of honour in our collection of comic geniuses.  *Deluxe version features special diorama display base themed from The Nutty Professor (1963).
nodes.name: Jerry Lewis (The Professor Edition - Deluxe)

nodes.description: Now all I gotta do is Spy-der-Woman my way inside…   Sideshow presents the Spider-Woman Fine Art Print, a sensational Marvel art print by Junggeun Yoon.  The Spider-Woman Fine Art Print shows Jessica Drew clad in her skintight red, black, and yellow costume. This spider-hero is poised upside down above New York City, her backdrop a radiant sunrise and gray buildings. Jessica's determined eyes have caught sight of her next target up ahead. One hand is raised as Spider-Woman readies her attack, preparing a venom blast for whichever criminals have wandered into her web.  Originally created as a variant cover for Spider-Woman Vol 7 #16 (2021), this comic book collectible is now available to fans in a fine art format. Each Spider-Woman Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Sideshow logo as part of the limited edition of 325 pieces. Available as an unframed, certified archival fine art print or in a custom framed presentation, this Marvel wall art makes an amazing addition to any collection.  Spin the threads of your own destiny when you bring home the Spider-Woman Fine Art Print by Junggeun Yoon today!
nodes.name: Spider-Woman

nodes.description: He was no ordinary man. He was a god. - Korg  Thor's retirement is interrupted by a galactic killer known as Gorr the God Butcher, who seeks the extinction of the gods. To combat the threat, Thor enlists the help of his alliance and embark upon a harrowing cosmic adventure to uncover the mystery of the God Butcher's vengeance and stop him before it's too late.   In anticipation of the release of Thor: Love and Thunder, Sideshow and Hot Toys are thrilled to introduce the Deluxe Version of the new sixth scale collectible figure of the God of Thunder - Thor with his new metallic gold and blue costume!  The brand-new Marvel collectible figure is skillfully crafted based on the appearance of Chris Hemsworth as Thor in the movie. It features a head sculpt specially applied with luminous reflective effect that accentuates Thor using his thunder power, a specialized body to depict his muscular physique, a red-colored cape, gold and blue body armor with LED light-up function, LED light-up Stormbreaker, assorted lightning effect accessories with luminous reflective effect applied, and a figure stand.   This Deluxe Version will exclusively include accessories for alternative styling, such as a LED light-up helmeted head sculpt, interchangeable chest armor, one pair of armored arms, and lightning effect accessories attachable to the helmet.  What's more, an additional accessory for Thor will be unveiled soon! So stay tuned as we are about to reveal the surprise!   This new Thor collectible figure will definitely be an incredible addition to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Thor (Deluxe Version)
